heading: Restrictions on employment of former officers or employees of Department of the Interior
label: 1355 Restrictions on employment of former officers or employees of Department of the Interior
notes: References in TextThe Executive Schedule, referred to in text, is set out in section 5311 et seq. of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.
